rationale: The alert package shows a clear UAC bypass attempt using sdclt.exe (A0) and control.exe (EV-003) to execute a malicious PowerShell command (EV-004). This PowerShell command was previously written to the registry (EV-001, EV-002) to hijack the 'open' command for folders, indicating persistence or privilege escalation. The PowerShell command itself attempts to extract and execute code from an image file, which is highly suspicious.
